History.Action: Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
History.Description: This Introduction was Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
This Introduction was P-C Item Approved by Comm
This Introduction was Introduced by Council
This Introduction was Referred to Comm by Council to the Committee on Parks and Recreation
A motion was made that this Introduction be Approved by Council approved by Roll Call.

Summary: This bill would co-name 103 thoroughfares and public places, based on requests of Council Members whose district includes the location.  Of these 103 co-names, 12 are either a relocation of a previously enacted co-naming or a revision to the street sign installed with respect to a previously enacted co-naming.
